article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service

briefs.title: Liquor Primary licensees may now offer bottle service — no application required
briefs.summary: Liquor Primary establishments can now sell whole bottles of spirits (bottle service). The change is automatic — no application needed — but strict serving, control, and storage rules apply.
briefs.action_required: Review and implement the bottle service terms: serving size limits, last-hour sales ban, bottle control system, and storage rules.
briefs.article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service
